Bakgu Noh.name: Bakgu Noh
Bakgu Noh.title: Driver of Gapriyoung Kim
Bakgu Noh.description: Gapryong Kim's driver and a legacy 0th-Generation figure from the Fist Gang.

Goo Cousin.name: Goo Cousin
Goo Cousin.title: Cicada
Goo Cousin.description: Goo Kim's cousin and a minor delinquent tied to the old middle-school circle.

Juncheol Yang.name: Juncheol Yang
Juncheol Yang.title: Bureau Cheif
Juncheol Yang.description: The Korean National Police Commissioner-General, representing law rather than street combat.

Jinjang.name: Jinjang
Jinjang.title: Workers
Jinjang.description: Jin Jang, the K-House manipulator who survives through planning, scams, and leverage.

Fujii Harushige.name: Fujii Harushige
Fujii Harushige.title: Yamazaki Syndicate
Fujii Harushige.description: A Yamazaki Syndicate operative from the Japanese underworld.

Isu Jo.name: Isu Jo
Isu Jo.title: The 1st Affiliate Haggler
Isu Jo.description: A calm Workers 1st Affiliate haggler who handles business with patience and precision.

Changyong Ji.name: Changyong Ji
Changyong Ji.title: The Suwon Successor
Changyong Ji.description: Seokdu's successor and the polished face of Suwon's fighting network.

Chungcheong.name: Chungcheong
Chungcheong.title: Creeper
Chungcheong.description: The former King of Chungcheong, displaced after the first-generation power shift.

Alexander Hwang.name: Alexander Hwang
Alexander Hwang.title: The Cowardly King
Alexander Hwang.description: A survival-first fighter who moved from delinquency to Workers executive work.

Yakuza Guard.name: Yakuza Guard
Yakuza Guard.title: Cheonliang
Yakuza Guard.description: A Cheonliang-era bodyguard tied to the Yamazaki and shaman protection details.

Kid Seonji.name: Kid Seonji
Kid Seonji.title: Kind King
Kid Seonji.description: Seongji Yuk in his abandoned childhood, before Mujin Jin's training turned him into a king.

Young Samuel.name: Young Samuel
Young Samuel.title: Passionate
Young Samuel.description: Samuel Seo in his early delinquent years, before he built his reputation in the crews.

Worker.name: Worker
Worker.title: Fodder
Worker.description: A generic Workers foot soldier built to represent disposable crew muscle.

Worker2.name: Worker2
Worker2.title: Fodder no.2
Worker2.description: An even more disposable Workers foot soldier, slightly sharper but still low-tier.

Jay Driver.name: Jay Driver
Jay Driver.title: Common
Jay Driver.description: Jay Hong's quiet support-role version, focused on loyalty, transport, and protection.

Jose Alvarez.name: Jose Alvarez
Jose Alvarez.title: Criminal
Jose Alvarez.description: A Workers Circus criminal operating on the edge of legality.

Raphael Gracey.name: Raphael Gracey
Raphael Gracey.title: Criminal
Raphael Gracey.description: Another Workers Circus criminal, used as a minor outlaw combatant.

Pat Toney.name: Pat Toney
Pat Toney.title: Criminal
Pat Toney.description: A rough circus-side enforcer built for armed brawls and dirty work.

Li Chao.name: Li Chao
Li Chao.title: Criminal
Li Chao.description: The Chinese kidnapper tied to Taegon Wi's childhood trauma.

Bully.name: Bully
Bully.title: Fodder
Bully.description: The generic school bully archetype that fills early-series street and school conflicts.

Dosoo Lee.name: Dosoo Lee
Dosoo Lee.title: Stone Head Service No.2
Dosoo Lee.description: Seokdu Staffing Agency's No. 2 and Changyong's hammer-wielding enforcer.

Fodder.name: Fodder
Fodder.title: Suwon Crew Head
Fodder.description: A low-tier Suwon crew head card built around raw presence rather than refinement.

Bayeonggun Heo.name: Bayeonggun Heo
Bayeonggun Heo.title: Suwon Twins
Bayeonggun Heo.description: One half of the Heo twins from Seokdu Staffing Agency Team One.

Byeonggwang Heo.name: Byeonggwang Heo
Byeonggwang Heo.title: Suwon Twins
Byeonggwang Heo.description: The other Heo twin from Team One, tuned more toward survival than flash.

Wooseok Choi.name: Wooseok Choi
Wooseok Choi.title: Vin's Friend
Wooseok Choi.description: A Cheonliang Fam friend of Vin Jin from the Cheongliang circle.

Hyungjae Lee.name: Hyungjae Lee
Hyungjae Lee.title: Vin's Friend
Hyungjae Lee.description: A second Cheonliang Fam friend of Vin Jin, built from the same old circle.

Jaewoo Park.name: Jaewoo Park
Jaewoo Park.title: Vin's Friend
Jaewoo Park.description: Mary Kim and Vin Jin's former friend who later led the Cheonliang Gang.

Taebong Lim.name: Taebong Lim
Taebong Lim.title: Vin's Friend
Taebong Lim.description: Cheonliang's wrestling specialist and ssireum champion.

Shaman Guards.name: Shaman Guards
Shaman Guards.title: Cheonliang
Shaman Guards.description: The shaman's enforcers in Cheonliang, assigned to protection and intimidation.

Changyong Ji [HfH Arc].name: Changyong Ji [HfH Arc]
Changyong Ji [HfH Arc].title: Upgraded Suwon Successor
Changyong Ji [HfH Arc].description: Later-arc version of Changyong Ji with a much higher ceiling than the original Suwon successor.

Lineman.name: Lineman
Lineman.title: First Appearance
Lineman.description: A loyal Big Deal member who keeps fighting despite being weaker than the main fighters.

moves.name: Stand Firm
moves.dialogue: He refuses to go down easily.

Doo Lee.name: Doo Lee
Doo Lee.title: Mother of All Badasses
Doo Lee.description: A weak but clever survivor who relies more on his brain than fighting ability.

moves.name: Trick
moves.dialogue: He uses a cheap trick to survive.

moves.name: Escape
moves.dialogue: He tries to get out of danger.

Guryong High School.name: Guryong High School
Guryong High School.title: High Fodders
Guryong High School.description: A group of high school delinquents stronger than ordinary bullies but still below named fighters.

Black Bear Gang.name: Black Bear Gang
Black Bear Gang.title: High Fodders
Black Bear Gang.description: A strong gang group that is tougher than normal fodder and dangerous in numbers.

moves.name: Gang Rush
moves.dialogue: They overwhelm the enemy with force.

Robert Choi.name: Robert Choi
Robert Choi.title: Acting Chief of BB Gang
Robert Choi.description: The acting chief of the Black Bear Gang, stronger and more experienced than the regular members.

moves.name: Rush
moves.dialogue: He attacks with the pressure of a gang leader.

moves.name: Heavy Strike
moves.dialogue: He lands a strong leader's blow.

Gangseo Middle School Head.name: Gangseo Middle School Head
Gangseo Middle School Head.title: Middle School Head
Gangseo Middle School Head.description: A middle school gang leader who is stronger than normal students but weaker than true gang fighters.

moves.name: Brawl
moves.dialogue: He fights with wild street pressure.

Old Face.name: Old Face
Old Face.title: Big Deal No. 2
Old Face.description: A former Big Deal No. 2 who is stronger than early Lineman but below stronger gang chiefs.

moves.name: Heavy Strike
moves.dialogue: He lands a strong direct blow.

Olly Wang Happy.name: Olly Wang
Olly Wang Happy.title: Middle School Happy
Olly Wang Happy.description: A cheerful middle schooler before becoming Hostel's Olly Wang. His main trait is his abnormal endurance from not feeling pain.

moves.name: Endure
moves.dialogue: He keeps standing despite the damage.

Ryuuto Magami.name: Ryuuto Magami
Ryuuto Magami.title: Head of Magami Clan
Ryuuto Magami.description: The head of the Magami Clan and a trained martial figure tied to Kenta Magami's background.

moves.name: Clan Strike
moves.dialogue: He uses refined Magami Clan technique.

moves.name: Head Strike
moves.dialogue: He attacks with the pressure of a clan head.

One Eyed Yamazaki.name: One Eyed Yamazaki
One Eyed Yamazaki.title: Yamazaki Syndicate Acting Chief
One Eyed Yamazaki.description: One of the Yamazaki Syndicate acting chiefs, fighting alongside Sunglasses Yamazaki with sharp technique and disciplined combat sense.

moves.name: Yamazaki Strike
moves.dialogue: He attacks with refined Yamazaki technique.

Sunglasses Yamazaki.name: Sunglasses Yamazaki
Sunglasses Yamazaki.title: Yamazaki Syndicate Acting Chief
Sunglasses Yamazaki.description: One of the Yamazaki Syndicate acting chiefs, fighting alongside One Eyed Yamazaki with heavy pressure and disciplined combat sense.

moves.name: Yamazaki Strike
moves.dialogue: He attacks with heavy Yamazaki pressure.

Sato Kazuma.name: Sato Kazuma
Sato Kazuma.title: Worker's 2A
Sato Kazuma.description: A Workers 2A fighter with solid physical ability and dirty combat experience.

moves.name: Rush
moves.dialogue: He rushes in with dirty pressure.

Vasco Lee.name: Vasco Lee
Vasco Lee.title: Burn Knuckles Head
Vasco Lee.description: The leader of Burn Knuckles, a powerful fighter known for his strength, endurance, and strong sense of justice.

moves.name: Rush
moves.dialogue: He charges forward with Burn Knuckles spirit.

Taegon Wi 3A.name: Taegon Wi
Taegon Wi 3A.title: Workers 3A
Taegon Wi 3A.description: A Workers 3A fighter with quick movement, sharp technique, and dirty combat experience.

moves.name: Rush
moves.dialogue: He rushes forward with Workers 3A pressure.

moves.name: Sharp Combo
moves.dialogue: He attacks with a quick combo.

Huseong Ha.name: Huseong Ha
Huseong Ha.title: Son of a Gorilla
Huseong Ha.description: A powerful fighter known for his gorilla-like strength, durability, and rough brawling style.

moves.name: Rush
moves.dialogue: He charges forward with overwhelming force.

moves.name: Heavy Blow
moves.dialogue: He lands a brutal heavy strike.

Brad Lee Gongwon Hippo.name: Brad Lee
Brad Lee Gongwon Hippo.title: Gongwon Hippo
Brad Lee Gongwon Hippo.description: An earlier, weaker version of Brad Lee known for his heavy body, toughness, and loyal Big Deal fighting spirit.

moves.name: Charge
moves.dialogue: He charges forward with heavy pressure.

moves.name: Push
moves.dialogue: He attacks with Big Deal spirit.

Vasco Lee 3A.name: Vasco Lee
Vasco Lee 3A.title: Workers 3A
Vasco Lee 3A.description: A Workers 3A version of Vasco Lee with improved strength, endurance, and trained combat pressure.

moves.name: Heavy Punch
moves.dialogue: Vasco throws a heavy direct punch.

moves.name: Low Kick
moves.dialogue: Vasco attacks with a strong low kick.

moves.name: Body Blow
moves.dialogue: Vasco drives a powerful strike into the body.

moves.name: Rush
moves.dialogue: Vasco charges forward with overwhelming Workers 3A pressure.

moves.name: Heavy Strike
moves.dialogue: Vasco attacks with raw conviction and heavy force.

OG Daniel Park 3A.name: OG Daniel Park
OG Daniel Park 3A.title: Worker's 3A
OG Daniel Park 3A.description: An early Workers 3A version of Daniel Park with good intelligence and Systema basics, but weaker physical ability and combat experience than Taegon Wi at this point.

moves.name: Systema Jab
moves.dialogue: Daniel throws a quick Systema-style jab.

moves.name: Systema Low Kick
moves.dialogue: Daniel attacks with a sharp low kick.

moves.name: Systema Palm Strike
moves.dialogue: Daniel uses a compact palm strike.

moves.name: Systema Move
moves.dialogue: Daniel adjusts his rhythm and attacks with Systema movement.

moves.name: Systema Counter
moves.dialogue: Daniel redirects the pressure and counters.

Zack Lee Heat Mode.name: Zack Lee
Zack Lee Heat Mode.title: Heat Mode
Zack Lee Heat Mode.description: A Heat Mode version of Zack Lee who fights with dirty boxing, speed, endurance, and reckless pressure.

moves.name: Dirty Jab
moves.dialogue: Zack throws a quick dirty jab.

moves.name: Rough Hook
moves.dialogue: Zack swings a rough boxing hook.

moves.name: Body Shot
moves.dialogue: Zack drives a punch into the body.

moves.name: Rush
moves.dialogue: Zack rushes in with wild Heat Mode pressure.

moves.name: Dirty Counter
moves.dialogue: Zack takes the hit and fires back with a dirty counter.

Logan Lee 3A.name: Logan Lee
Logan Lee 3A.title: Goo's Friend
Logan Lee 3A.description: A slow but durable brawler with strong combat instincts, dirty fighting experience, and a connection to Goo Kim.

moves.name: Body Slam
moves.dialogue: Logan throws his weight into a brutal slam.

moves.name: Dirty Punch
moves.dialogue: Logan lands a rough dirty punch.

moves.name: Grapple
moves.dialogue: Logan closes the distance and overwhelms with grappling pressure.

moves.name: Street Counter
moves.dialogue: Logan reads the attack and counters with dirty street fighting.

Channing Choi.name: Channing Choi
Channing Choi.title: Ansan Public No.2
Channing Choi.description: The No.2 of Ansan Public, a cruel tattooist fighter who uses rough street pressure, intimidation, and painful strikes to break opponents.

moves.name: Tattoo Jab
moves.dialogue: Channing throws a sharp jab like he is marking his target.

moves.name: Rough Kick
moves.dialogue: Channing attacks with a rough street kick.

moves.name: Pain Mark
moves.dialogue: Channing strikes to leave pain behind.

moves.name: Pain Engraving
moves.dialogue: Channing attacks with cruel pressure, like carving trauma into the fight.

moves.name: Ansan Pressure
moves.dialogue: Channing overwhelms his opponent with Ansan Public's No.2 brutality.

Vin Jin Workers 2A.name: Vin Jin
Vin Jin Workers 2A.title: Workers 2A
Vin Jin Workers 2A.description: A Workers 2A version of Vin Jin with murder intent, rough Kudo, strong hardware, and dangerous close-range pressure.

moves.name: Kudo Grip
moves.dialogue: Vin Jin grabs with rough Kudo pressure.

moves.name: Heavy Punch
moves.dialogue: Vin Jin throws a heavy punch with focused intent.

moves.name: Shoulder Throw
moves.dialogue: Vin Jin uses raw force to throw his opponent.

moves.name: Kudo Rush
moves.dialogue: Vin Jin closes the distance with heavy Kudo pressure.

moves.name: Kudo Slam
moves.dialogue: Vin Jin drives his opponent down with a Kudo slam.

Shiba Inu Workers 2A.name: Shiba Inu
Shiba Inu Workers 2A.title: Workers 2A
Shiba Inu Workers 2A.description: The brainwashed Sinu Han of Workers 2A, a dangerous fighter who overwhelmed Jake and the others before his memories began returning.

moves.name: Fast Strike
moves.dialogue: Shiba Inu attacks with a fast direct strike.

moves.name: Sharp Kick
moves.dialogue: Shiba Inu throws a sharp kick with controlled force.

moves.name: Body Shot
moves.dialogue: Shiba Inu drives a quick strike into the body.

moves.name: Controlled Rush
moves.dialogue: Shiba Inu attacks with controlled Workers 2A pressure.

moves.name: Memory Strike
moves.dialogue: Shiba Inu fights through a memory flash and strikes back.

Samuel Seo Workers 2A.name: Samuel Seo
Samuel Seo Workers 2A.title: Workers 2A
Samuel Seo Workers 2A.description: A Workers 2A version of Samuel Seo with strong endurance, ruthless pressure, and manipulative fighting instincts before his Crazy Mode version.

moves.name: Heavy Punch
moves.dialogue: Samuel throws a heavy direct punch.

moves.name: Knee Strike
moves.dialogue: Samuel drives a knee into his opponent.

moves.name: Body Slam
moves.dialogue: Samuel uses rough force to slam his opponent.

moves.name: Pressure
moves.dialogue: Samuel overwhelms his opponent with Workers 2A pressure.

moves.name: Counter
moves.dialogue: Samuel takes the opening and counters with force.

Ryuhei Kuroda Workers 2A.name: Ryuhei Kuroda
Ryuhei Kuroda Workers 2A.title: Workers 2A
Ryuhei Kuroda Workers 2A.description: A Workers 2A version of Ryuhei Kuroda with strong leadership, biker-gang combat experience, and dangerous fighting spirit.

moves.name: Biker Punch
moves.dialogue: Ryuhei throws a rough biker-style punch.

moves.name: Heavy Kick
moves.dialogue: Ryuhei attacks with a heavy kick.

moves.name: Fighting Spirit
moves.dialogue: Ryuhei pushes forward with relentless fighting spirit.

Warren Chae Workers 2A.name: Warren Chae
Warren Chae Workers 2A.title: Workers 2A
Warren Chae Workers 2A.description: A Workers 2A version of Warren Chae with early CQC, sharp movement, and growing combat intelligence.

moves.name: CQC Jab
moves.dialogue: Warren attacks with a short CQC jab.

moves.name: CQC Elbow
moves.dialogue: Warren closes the gap with a compact elbow strike.

moves.name: Low Strike
moves.dialogue: Warren strikes low with controlled precision.

moves.name: CQC Rush
moves.dialogue: Warren rushes forward using early CQC pressure.

moves.name: Gangdong Counter
moves.dialogue: Warren reads the attack and counters with Gangdong fighting sense.

Jake Kim Workers 2A.name: Jake Kim
Jake Kim Workers 2A.title: Workers 2A
Jake Kim Workers 2A.description: A Workers 2A version of Jake Kim who fought under pressure against brainwashed Sinu Han while Sinu suffered memory headaches.

moves.name: Big Deal Punch
moves.dialogue: Jake throws a strong Big Deal punch.

moves.name: Street Kick
moves.dialogue: Jake attacks with a sharp street kick.

moves.name: Body Blow
moves.dialogue: Jake drives a heavy strike into the body.

moves.name: Resolve
moves.dialogue: Jake pushes forward with Big Deal resolve.

moves.name: Counter
moves.dialogue: Jake reads the pressure and counters under Workers 2A chaos.

Yamazaki Gun Cheonliang Arc.name: Yamazaki Gun
Yamazaki Gun Cheonliang Arc.title: Cheonliang Arc
Yamazaki Gun Cheonliang Arc.description: A younger Gun Park during the Cheonliang period, already terrifying through Yamazaki combat, overwhelming strength, and elite battle sense.

moves.name: Yamazaki Straight
moves.dialogue: Gun drives forward with a sharp Yamazaki-style straight.

moves.name: Iron Low Kick
moves.dialogue: Gun attacks the base with a heavy low kick.

moves.name: Body Strike
moves.dialogue: Gun crushes the body with controlled force.

moves.name: Power Threshold
moves.dialogue: Gun releases overwhelming strength through a precise strike.

moves.name: Yamazaki Counter
moves.dialogue: Gun reads the attack and counters with brutal timing.

moves.name: Yamazaki Impact
moves.dialogue: Gun closes the distance and lands a decisive Yamazaki finishing blow.

James Lee 2T Cheonliang Arc.name: James Lee
James Lee 2T Cheonliang Arc.title: Cheonliang Arc
James Lee 2T Cheonliang Arc.description: A two-threshold James Lee during the Cheonliang period, already defined by elite speed, technical precision, and early invisible-strike pressure.

moves.name: Silent Step
moves.dialogue: James shifts position with clean footwork.

moves.name: Precision Kick
moves.dialogue: James lands a sharp kick at a weak point.

moves.name: Angle Feint
moves.dialogue: James creates an opening with a subtle angle change.

moves.name: Speed Threshold
moves.dialogue: James attacks from the opponent's blind spot with overwhelming speed.

moves.name: Technique Threshold
moves.dialogue: James dismantles the guard with refined technique.

moves.name: Threshold Finish
moves.dialogue: James combines speed and technique into a clean finishing sequence.

Jichang Kwak Holiday Arc.name: Jichang Kwak
Jichang Kwak Holiday Arc.title: Holiday Arc
Jichang Kwak Holiday Arc.description: The former King of Seoul and King of Chungcheong, a tactical fighter with overwhelming hand-blade pressure and dual mastery.

moves.name: Hand-Blade Strike
moves.dialogue: Jichang cuts through the guard with a precise hand-blade.

moves.name: King's Step
moves.dialogue: Jichang closes distance with composed movement.

moves.name: Tactical Feint
moves.dialogue: Jichang tests the opponent's reaction with a calculated feint.

moves.name: Seoul Strike
moves.dialogue: Jichang strikes with the force of a former Seoul King.

moves.name: Threshold Counter
moves.dialogue: Jichang uses strength and speed to counter cleanly.

moves.name: King's Hand-Blade
moves.dialogue: Jichang delivers a decisive hand-blade strike with complete control.

UI OG Daniel Holiday Arc.name: UI OG Daniel
UI OG Daniel Holiday Arc.title: Holiday Arc
UI OG Daniel Holiday Arc.description: Original-body Daniel in Ultra Instinct, fighting through automatic combat response and copied techniques without any mastery.

moves.name: Automatic Strike
moves.dialogue: Daniel attacks without hesitation through instinctive movement.

moves.name: Copied Step
moves.dialogue: Daniel mirrors a refined step and closes the gap.

moves.name: Instinctive Kick
moves.dialogue: Daniel throws a clean kick without conscious delay.

moves.name: Copy Response
moves.dialogue: Daniel instantly responds with a copied technique.

moves.name: UI Counter
moves.dialogue: Daniel counters the attack through automatic combat reaction.

moves.name: UI Sequence
moves.dialogue: Daniel chains copied movements into a precise finishing sequence.

Charles Choi Holiday Arc.name: Charles Choi
Charles Choi Holiday Arc.title: Holiday Arc
Charles Choi Holiday Arc.description: The weakest shown version of Charles Choi, aged and one-armed, but still carrying all four masteries and elite combat intelligence.

moves.name: One-Handed Strike
moves.dialogue: Charles attacks with precise one-handed force.

moves.name: Controlled Step
moves.dialogue: Charles shifts his stance with veteran control.

moves.name: Pressure Jab
moves.dialogue: Charles probes the defense with a sharp jab.

moves.name: Mastery Counter
moves.dialogue: Charles counters using complete mastery control.

moves.name: Elite Intercept
moves.dialogue: Charles reads the attack and intercepts before it fully forms.

moves.name: Chairman Strike
moves.dialogue: Charles ends the exchange with cold and precise execution.

Goo Kim Cheonliang Arc.name: Goo Kim
Goo Kim Cheonliang Arc.title: Cheonliang Arc
Goo Kim Cheonliang Arc.description: A Cheonliang-era Goo Kim, dangerous through improvisation, weapon handling, and unpredictable combat rhythm without confirmed mastery.

moves.name: Improvised Cut
moves.dialogue: Goo turns a simple opening into a weaponized slash.

moves.name: Quick Draw
moves.dialogue: Goo strikes with sudden weapon movement.

moves.name: Pivot Slash
moves.dialogue: Goo changes angle and cuts through the guard.

moves.name: Weapon Shift
moves.dialogue: Goo adapts his weapon path mid-combat.

moves.name: Edge Counter
moves.dialogue: Goo attacks from an awkward angle with perfect timing.

moves.name: Blade Finish
moves.dialogue: Goo finishes with a clean weapon sequence that leaves no safe angle.

Seongji Yuk 2T.name: Seongji Yuk
Seongji Yuk 2T.title: King of Cheonliang
Seongji Yuk 2T.description: Two-threshold Seongji Yuk, focused on overwhelming strength, extreme endurance, and disciplined Cheonliang grappling.

moves.name: Cheonliang Grip
moves.dialogue: Seongji seizes control with a crushing grip.

moves.name: Heavy Throw
moves.dialogue: Seongji throws the opponent with raw power.

moves.name: Iron Clinch
moves.dialogue: Seongji locks the opponent down with heavy pressure.

moves.name: Power Threshold
moves.dialogue: Seongji releases overwhelming strength through a direct attack.

moves.name: Endurance Threshold
moves.dialogue: Seongji absorbs pressure and drives forward.

moves.name: King's Throw
moves.dialogue: Seongji ends the exchange with a crushing Cheonliang throw.

The Thing Workers 1A.name: The Thing
The Thing Workers 1A.title: Workers 1A No.1
The Thing Workers 1A.description: A massive Workers 1A brute with overwhelming strength and endurance, but low intelligence and crude technique.

moves.name: Heavy Grab
moves.dialogue: The Thing grabs with overwhelming force.

moves.name: Shoulder Crash
moves.dialogue: The Thing crashes forward with his massive body.

moves.name: Ground Pound
moves.dialogue: The Thing slams down with brute force.

moves.name: Iron Body Charge
moves.dialogue: The Thing tanks the pressure and drives forward.

moves.name: Heavy Hold
moves.dialogue: The Thing traps the opponent in a brutal hold.

moves.name: Heavy Impact
moves.dialogue: The Thing delivers a raw finishing blow with monstrous force.

Johan Seong Workers 1A.name: Johan Seong
Johan Seong Workers 1A.title: Workers 1A
Johan Seong Workers 1A.description: A Workers 1A Johan Seong with dangerous Copy ability, elite technique, and high speed, limited by unstable eyesight and weaker hardware.

moves.name: Copied Jab
moves.dialogue: Johan copies a clean jab and fires it back.

moves.name: Quick Step
moves.dialogue: Johan moves in with sharp speed.

moves.name: Imitation Kick
moves.dialogue: Johan mirrors a refined kick from memory.

moves.name: Accelerated Copy
moves.dialogue: Johan copies the opponent's rhythm and attacks immediately.

moves.name: Blindspot Adaptation
moves.dialogue: Johan adjusts his timing despite unstable vision.

moves.name: Imitation Burst
moves.dialogue: Johan compresses copied techniques into a fast finishing burst.

Seokdu Wang.name: Seokdu Wang
Seokdu Wang.title: King of Suwon
Seokdu Wang.description: The King of Suwon, a powerful and durable fighter known for direct pressure, headbutts, and simple but dangerous combat.

moves.name: Suwon Headbutt
moves.dialogue: Seokdu attacks with his signature headbutt.

moves.name: Heavy Swing
moves.dialogue: Seokdu throws a heavy direct swing.

moves.name: Body Drive
moves.dialogue: Seokdu pushes forward with his full frame.

moves.name: King's Pressure
moves.dialogue: Seokdu overwhelms the opponent with Suwon's pressure.

moves.name: Heavy Counter
moves.dialogue: Seokdu absorbs the hit and counters with raw force.

moves.name: Suwon Crash
moves.dialogue: Seokdu lands a full-force headbutt that shakes the opponent.

Taesoo Ma.name: Taesoo Ma
Taesoo Ma.title: King of Ansan
Taesoo Ma.description: The King of Ansan, a strength-focused fighter whose right fist remains one of the most dangerous weapons among the Kings.

moves.name: Ansan Fist
moves.dialogue: Taesoo throws a direct power punch.

moves.name: Guard Break
moves.dialogue: Taesoo attacks through the opponent's guard.

moves.name: Right-Hand Feint
moves.dialogue: Taesoo threatens with his dominant fist.

moves.name: Power Threshold
moves.dialogue: Taesoo releases the full force of his strength mastery.

moves.name: King's Right Hand
moves.dialogue: Taesoo commits to a devastating right-hand strike.

moves.name: King's Fist
moves.dialogue: Taesoo lands a crushing blow from the fist that defines Ansan.

Jinyoung Park Medicine Genius.name: Jinyoung Park
Jinyoung Park Medicine Genius.title: Medicine Genius
Jinyoung Park Medicine Genius.description: Jinyoung Park as the Medicine Genius, a complete master with elite intelligence, medical precision, and all four masteries.

moves.name: Nerve Check
moves.dialogue: Jinyoung targets a vulnerable point with a controlled hit.

moves.name: Copy Step
moves.dialogue: Jinyoung mirrors the opponent's movement and shifts position.

moves.name: Medical Precision
moves.dialogue: Jinyoung attacks a weak point with surgical accuracy.

moves.name: Mastery Flow
moves.dialogue: Jinyoung links all four masteries into a controlled sequence.

moves.name: Precision Sequence
moves.dialogue: Jinyoung reads the body and finishes with a precise technical chain.

Goo Kim 1st Moonlight Technique.name: Goo Kim
Goo Kim 1st Moonlight Technique.title: 1st Moonlight Technique
Goo Kim 1st Moonlight Technique.description: Goo Kim using the first Moonlight Technique, a weapon-focused style with terrifying precision and overwhelming blade control.

moves.name: Moonlight Cut
moves.dialogue: Goo cuts with a clean Moonlight path.

moves.name: Blade Step
moves.dialogue: Goo shifts with his weapon already in motion.

moves.name: Guard Split
moves.dialogue: Goo slices through the opponent's guard angle.

moves.name: Moonlight Technique
moves.dialogue: Goo releases a precise Moonlight sword sequence.

moves.name: Weapon Control
moves.dialogue: Goo turns the weapon angle into an unavoidable threat.

moves.name: Moonlight Arc
moves.dialogue: Goo completes the first Moonlight Technique with a decisive blade arc.

Gun Park Shiro Oni.name: Gun Park
Gun Park Shiro Oni.title: Shiro Oni
Gun Park Shiro Oni.description: Gun Park as Shiro Oni, a peak Mythical-level monster defined by overwhelming strength, endurance, and Yamazaki combat.

moves.name: Yamazaki Straight
moves.dialogue: Gun drives forward with a devastating straight.

moves.name: Iron Roundhouse
moves.dialogue: Gun attacks with a heavy Yamazaki roundhouse.

moves.name: Bone Crush
moves.dialogue: Gun breaks through the opponent's defense with raw force.

moves.name: Iron Pressure
moves.dialogue: Gun overwhelms the field with demonic pressure.

moves.name: Endurance Threshold
moves.dialogue: Gun absorbs damage and answers with heavier force.

moves.name: Yamazaki Break
moves.dialogue: Gun finishes with the full weight of Shiro Oni power.

Tom Lee Beggar King.name: Tom Lee
Tom Lee Beggar King.title: Beggar King
Tom Lee Beggar King.description: Tom Lee as the Beggar King, a complete monster with all four masteries, ruthless combat habits, and overwhelming fighting experience.

moves.name: Wild Grab
moves.dialogue: Tom closes in with a brutal grab.

moves.name: Heavy Stomp
moves.dialogue: Tom stomps down with ruthless force.

moves.name: Dirty Feint
moves.dialogue: Tom tricks the opponent with an ugly but effective feint.

moves.name: Combat Read
moves.dialogue: Tom reads the exchange and attacks from an unexpected angle.

moves.name: Wild Intercept
moves.dialogue: Tom interrupts the opponent before they can complete their action.

moves.name: Full-Body Assault
moves.dialogue: Tom ends the fight with a ruthless full-body assault.

James Lee 3T Cheonliang Arc.name: James Lee
James Lee 3T Cheonliang Arc.title: Cheonliang Arc
James Lee 3T Cheonliang Arc.description: Three-threshold James Lee during the Cheonliang period, a near-complete speed and technique monster with growing endurance.

moves.name: Blindspot Kick
moves.dialogue: James attacks from a blind spot with a clean kick.

moves.name: Angle Break
moves.dialogue: James breaks the opponent's position with a sharp angle.

moves.name: Invisible Strike
moves.dialogue: James attacks faster than the opponent can properly track.

moves.name: Threshold Flow
moves.dialogue: James links speed, endurance, and technique into a complete sequence.

moves.name: Cheonliang Flash
moves.dialogue: James finishes with a high-speed sequence of invisible strikes.

Seongji Yuk 3T.name: Seongji Yuk
Seongji Yuk 3T.title: King of Cheonliang
Seongji Yuk 3T.description: Three-threshold Seongji Yuk, a Cheonliang King with terrifying strength, endurance, and improved speed.

moves.name: King's Grip
moves.dialogue: Seongji takes control with a crushing grip.

moves.name: Mujin Throw
moves.dialogue: Seongji throws the opponent with overwhelming force.

moves.name: Threshold Drive
moves.dialogue: Seongji combines strength, speed, and endurance into one charge.

moves.name: Cheonliang Lock
moves.dialogue: Seongji traps the opponent and shuts down their movement.

moves.name: Mountain Throw
moves.dialogue: Seongji finishes with a devastating Cheonliang throw.

Manager Kim White Tiger No.2.name: Manager Kim
Manager Kim White Tiger No.2.title: White Tiger No.2
Manager Kim White Tiger No.2.description: Manager Kim as White Tiger No.2, a complete military combat specialist with all four masteries and elite technical control.

moves.name: CQC Jab
moves.dialogue: Manager Kim strikes with compact close-quarters precision.

moves.name: Joint Lock
moves.dialogue: Manager Kim attacks the joint with controlled force.

moves.name: Tactical Step
moves.dialogue: Manager Kim shifts into a better angle without wasted motion.

moves.name: Military Precision
moves.dialogue: Manager Kim targets a weak point with trained accuracy.

moves.name: CQC Suppression
moves.dialogue: Manager Kim shuts down the opponent with close-quarters control.

moves.name: CQC Sequence
moves.dialogue: Manager Kim executes a complete CQC finishing sequence.

Kitae Kim Silhouette.name: Kitae Kim
Kitae Kim Silhouette.title: Silhouette
Kitae Kim Silhouette.description: Kitae Kim in silhouette, a peak Infernal threat defined by monstrous strength, brutal endurance, and overwhelming presence.

moves.name: Heavy Strike
moves.dialogue: Kitae attacks with frightening raw power.

moves.name: Heavy Step-In
moves.dialogue: Kitae closes the gap with predatory pressure.

moves.name: Heavy Blow
moves.dialogue: Kitae lands a brutal force-driven hit.

moves.name: Frame Control
moves.dialogue: Kitae uses his physical presence to dominate the exchange.

moves.name: Endurance Breaker
moves.dialogue: Kitae tanks the impact and answers with crushing force.

moves.name: Silhouette Strike
moves.dialogue: Kitae ends the fight with a brutal, unreadable finishing strike.

Diego Kang Idol of PTJ Company.name: Diego Kang
Diego Kang Idol of PTJ Company.title: Idol of PTJ Company
Diego Kang Idol of PTJ Company.description: Diego Kang at peak Abyssal level, a supreme speed and technique monster whose invisible strikes define the top of the system.

moves.name: Invisible Step
moves.dialogue: Diego moves before the opponent can react.

moves.name: Vital Kick
moves.dialogue: Diego targets a vital point with a clean kick.

moves.name: Hands-Free Feint
moves.dialogue: Diego creates an opening with effortless movement.

moves.name: Invisible Strike
moves.dialogue: Diego attacks from a blind spot at overwhelming speed.

moves.name: Perfect Footwork
moves.dialogue: Diego controls the entire exchange through flawless positioning.

moves.name: Final Sequence
moves.dialogue: Diego ends the fight with a perfect invisible-strike sequence.
